root.sql:
SELECT sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no, sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.present_address, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description, prename||member_name ||' '|| member_surname as member_surname, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_lon_m_loan_card.last_access_date , 'dd/mm/yyyy') as last_access_date, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_lon_m_loan_card.last_calcint_date , 'dd/mm/yyyy') as last_calcint_date, sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , 'dd/mm/yyyy') as begining_of_contract, sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( '!begining_of_contract_1!' , 'SD MONTH YYYY') as s_tdate , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( '!begining_of_contract_2!' , 'SD MONTH YYYY') as e_tdate,
(CASE (select pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(max(FPB_GET_LOAN_PAYMENT_DATE(sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_contract_no , sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.seq_no)),'DD/MM/YYYY') from sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail ,sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_card_item where sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.item_type_code = sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_card_item.item_type_code and sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_card_item.sign_status = '-1' ) WHEN null THEN '-' ELSE (select pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(max(FPB_GET_LOAN_PAYMENT_DATE(sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_contract_no , sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.seq_no)),'DD/MM/YYYY') from sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail ,sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_card_item where sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.item_type_code = sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_card_item.item_type_code and sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_card_item.sign_status = '-1') END) as loan_payment_date
FROM sc_lon_m_contract, sc_mem_m_share_mem, sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_prename, sc_lon_m_rule, sc_lon_m_loan_card
WHERE ( sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code ) and ( sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ) and sc_lon_m_contract.atm_status = '1' and sc_lon_m_loan_card.close_status = '0' and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = 'สม'
/*WHERE*/
--and ( sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract between '01/05/2024' and '20/05/2024') --and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type = '' ) order by sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract
